name: Parsley and Garlic with Olive Oil Over Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh Italian parsley, chopped fine
1/4 cup reduced chicken broth (boil 1 cup down to 1/2)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over moderate-to-high heat.
2. Add the chopped parsley and garlic. When they sizzle and begin to brown, stir for 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the reduced chicken broth, taking care to avoid splattering.
4. Simmer until the sauce is heated through.
5. Pour the sauce over cooked pasta.
